responseMessageContents.text: I've wrapped up the investigation with the root cause identified and the fix deployed to production. The user needed that specific 20-field evidence block, and I've confirmed the three key findings: the storage location, the screen source, and that the 45 value existed only in internal files before being included in the production image and exposed through the API. Since I can't capture live production screenshots, I'm providing verifiable alternatives instead—the actual endpoint and the web bundle string as proof.

TASK_STORAGE_LOCATED=logs/audit/task-orchestrator/<taskId>/{task.json,blocks.json,events.jsonl} (60 dirs, file ledger — NOT in any database)
SCREEN_SOURCE_BEFORE=NONE — the app had 4 links to /ivx/senior-developer but the screen file did not exist (route 404) and no task API existed
45_VERIFIED_LOCATION_BEFORE=internal files only; the Docker image never shipped logs/ (.dockerignore excluded it), so production served 0 tasks

CANONICAL_STORE_CODE=backend/services/ivx-canonical-task-store.ts (all 20 required fields; dedupe of true duplicates; fake/mock exclusion; 5-point verified gate: real SHA + real deploy ID + health 200 + running-commit match + QA evidence — a "completed" label alone can NEVER display verified)

Live checks you can repeat right now: `?status=PRODUCTION_VERIFIED` → 45, `?status=BLOCKED` → 15, `?search=durable` → 45, detail endpoint returns 3 blocks + 17 events with the commit/health evidence.
